extraction.one_line_summary: PEDERSEN Mads won stage 2 sprint after Bora-Hansgrohe briefly split the peloton at 70.5km out with crosswind pressure, POGACAR took intermediate sprint at 12.5km for bonus seconds.
tactical_patterns: Bora-Hansgrohe initiated echelon split at 70.5km despite only modest wind, showing aggressive reconnaissance tactics on flat stages.
UAE Emirates deliberately contested intermediate sprint at 12.5km with POGACAR for bonus seconds despite no GC threat, revealing micro-second optimization strategy.
Technical downhill finish at 90kph plus traffic islands inside 1.5km eliminated multiple sprint trains, rewarding positioning over pure speed.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: contested flat intermediate sprint for 6 bonus seconds despite being GC favorite, showing willingness to accumulate micro-gains
rider_signals.LATEUR Pierre: negative: crashed in nervous town section unrelated to crosswinds, suggesting positioning vulnerability in technical sections
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: lost positioning wheel of VAN POPPEL in final 500m, indicating sprint train disintegration on technical finishes
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: caught out before final sprint despite being top sprinter, positioning error or team failure
